title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: rpm-ostree bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for rpm-ostree is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The rpm-ostree tool binds together the RPM packaging model with the OSTree model of bootable file system trees. It provides commands that can be used both on client systems and on server-side composes. The rpm-ostree-client package provides commands for client systems to perform upgrades and rollbacks.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Rebase rpm-ostree to 2025.11 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-113380)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
full_text:
An update for rpm-ostree is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The rpm-ostree tool binds together the RPM packaging model with the OSTree model of bootable file system trees. It provides commands that can be used both on client systems and on server-side composes. The rpm-ostree-client package provides commands for client systems to perform upgrades and rollbacks.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Rebase rpm-ostree to 2025.11 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-113380)
